'''dogapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeastless|yeastless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeastless|yeastless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dogapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dogapithi|dogapithi]] || [[word:dogapiji|dogapiji]] || [[word:dogapishi|dogapishi]] || [[word:dogapiki|dogapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dogaputhuthu|dogaputhuthu]] || [[word:dogapujuju|dogapujuju]] || [[word:dogapushushu|dogapushushu]] || [[word:dogapukuku|dogapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dogaputhu|dogaputhu]] || [[word:dogapuju|dogapuju]] || [[word:dogapushu|dogapushu]] || [[word:dogapuku|dogapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dogapufthuf|dogapufthuf]] || [[word:dogapufjuf|dogapufjuf]] || [[word:dogapufshuf|dogapufshuf]] || [[word:dogapufkuf|dogapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dogapethe|dogapethe]] || [[word:dogapeje|dogapeje]] || [[word:dogapeshe|dogapeshe]] || [[word:dogapeke|dogapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dogapothotho|dogapothotho]] || [[word:dogapojojo|dogapojojo]] || [[word:dogaposhosho|dogaposhosho]] || [[word:dogapokoko|dogapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dogapotho|dogapotho]] || [[word:dogapojo|dogapojo]] || [[word:dogaposho|dogaposho]] || [[word:dogapoko|dogapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dogapofthof|dogapofthof]] || [[word:dogapofjof|dogapofjof]] || [[word:dogapofshof|dogapofshof]] || [[word:dogapofkof|dogapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfthÃŸf|dogapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfjÃŸf|dogapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfshÃŸf|dogapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfkÃŸf|dogapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dogapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dogapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dogapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dogapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfthÃŸf|dogapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfjÃŸf|dogapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfshÃŸf|dogapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfkÃŸf|dogapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfthÃŸf|dogapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfjÃŸf|dogapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfshÃŸf|dogapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dogapÃŸfkÃŸf|dogapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dogapÃḊthÃḊ|dogapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dogapÃḊjÃḊ|dogapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dogapÃḊshÃḊ|dogapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dogapÃḊkÃḊ|dogapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dogapathatha|dogapathatha]] || [[word:dogapajaja|dogapajaja]] || [[word:dogapashasha|dogapashasha]] || [[word:dogapakaka|dogapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dogapatha|dogapatha]] || [[word:dogapaja|dogapaja]] || [[word:dogapasha|dogapasha]] || [[word:dogapaka|dogapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dogapafthaf|dogapafthaf]] || [[word:dogapafjaf|dogapafjaf]] || [[word:dogapafshaf|dogapafshaf]] || [[word:dogapafkaf|dogapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dogapasha|dogapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dogapshÃḋsha|dogapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dogaprosha|dogaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dogapmusha|dogapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dogapyasha|dogapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godogapnkshÃḋsha|godogapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godogapnkrosha|godogapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godogapnkmusha|godogapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godogapnkyasha|godogapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dogagapasha|dogagapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dogagapshÃḋsha|dogagapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dogagaprosha|dogagaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dogagapmusha|dogagapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dogagapyasha|dogagapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godogagapnkshÃḋsha|godogagapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godogagapnkrosha|godogagapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godogagapnkmusha|godogagapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godogagapnkyasha|godogagapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:degÃḊpasha|degÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:degÃḊpshÃḋsha|degÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:degÃḊprosha|degÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:degÃḊpmusha|degÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:degÃḊpyasha|degÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godegÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|godegÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godegÃḊpnkrosha|godegÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godegÃḊpnkmusha|godegÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godegÃḊpnkyasha|godegÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dogfapasha|dogfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dogfapshÃḋsha|dogfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dogfaprosha|dogfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dogfapmusha|dogfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dogfapyasha|dogfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godogfapnkshÃḋsha|godogfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godogfapnkrosha|godogfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godogfapnkmusha|godogfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godogfapnkyasha|godogfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
